I showed you guys this during yesterday's presentation that basically all of these two tiers of the value that I've come off of you making an offer, right? We talked about all during session number one. We created this amazing offer and we got two ways to sell that offer. Number one is we unboxed that offer like I showed you guys during a yesterday's session. We said, okay, this first offer is going to be the first thing and the second thing and upsell and one more upsell. Number two, the order form bump. We unboxed that offer and we laid out a logical sequencing of offers. Number two is take the entire offer we created and we just sell it all at once. This is where we start selling more expensive things. The way we sell something for 500 or 1000 or 2000 or $5000 is by making a presentation and that presentation increases the perceived value you're selling and then you actually sell the person the thing. Now, I love all these types of funnels but presentation funnels are one of my favorites. During the very first introduction session, I talked about hook story offer and story selling, how we grab people and we tell stories. All those things we talked about there are going to be elements inside of the presentations you are making. One thing I would highly recommend, I'm not going to go deep into it during this training just because it's outside of contact or what we're covering but if you've read the expert secrets book or gone through my perfect webinar training, that presentation is perfect. That's why we call it the perfect webinar. It's the perfect presentation. I would highly recommend studying that because it doesn't matter if you're using a video sales letter, a webinar funnel or a product launch funnel, the script is the same. That's the big secret. It's the same presentation. I use the perfect webinar on my video sales. I use the perfect webinar on my webinars. I use the perfect webinar on my product launch funnel. That script, that presentation is important to master and to understand because it is where you're going to be plugging into all these different funnels. I'll show that a little bit as we go through here. But just for those of you who want to go deeper, again, this whole training of funnialology is more about the funnel structure and funnel frameworks and then the art is you weaving your stories into it. That's the next piece for you to start learning and mastering is the art. How to do those presentations and things like that. That's what's happening. Today, though, is we're focusing on presentation funnels.
